evals.prompt: Stiamo valutando se portare il team marketing in-house o continuare con l'agenzia esterna. Budget simile, ma il CEO vuole piu' controllo. Aiutami a ragionare su questa decisione.
evals.expected_output: Lens suggests a multi-perspective topology (star or parallel_hats), configures 3-5 agents with diverse constraints, runs the session, and produces a Field Map with convergences, divergences, and synthesis.

evals.prompt: /lens "Il nostro prodotto SaaS B2B dovrebbe offrire un free tier o solo trial a tempo?" --quick
evals.expected_output: Lens runs a QUICK mode topology (cascade or steelman_chain), launches 2-4 sequential agents, and produces a Cascade Report with a surviving core position.

evals.prompt: /lens "Vogliamo espanderci in Germania come primo mercato europeo" --topology scenario_matrix
evals.expected_output: Lens uses scenario_matrix topology (DEEP mode), configures 4-5 agents for different scenarios, runs multi-round deliberation, produces a Field Map with scenario outcomes.
